name: Iñigo Zabaleta-Mendizabal
summary: Accomplished Machine Learning Engineer with over 8 years of experience in designing and deploying scalable predictive models. Proven track record in optimizing deep learning architectures for production environments and leading cross-functional teams to deliver data-driven business solutions.

experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Lead the development of computer vision pipelines for automated logistics, improving processing speed by 40 percent. Mentor junior engineers and oversee the deployment of models using Kubernetes and cloud-native infrastructure.

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Developed and maintained fraud detection algorithms using ensemble learning techniques. Collaborated with data scientists to transition research prototypes into high-availability microservices.

experience.title: Data Scientist
experience.description: Built predictive models for customer churn analysis and optimized marketing spend through advanced statistical modeling and A/B testing frameworks.
